user.title: SMHI
user.description: Set up SMHI forecast. Home location is currently {home_latitude}, {home_longitude}. Disable Home location if you want to use custom coordinates.

confirm.title: Confirm SMHI setup

sensors.title: Choose sensor groups
sensors.description:
Select which optional sensor groups to enable.

**Core sensors** (always enabled): Precipitation, Clouds, Thunderstorm Probability, Symbol Code, Metadata

**Optional sensors** (calculated from SMHI data):
• Comfort: Apparent temperature (feels like)
• Frost: Risk assessment and frost detection
• Slippery: Ice/snow road condition alerts
• Impact: Overall weather severity score
• Practical: Clothing/sleep/exercise recommendations
• Thermal: Advanced comfort indices (heat index, humidex, dew point)

⚠️ **Disclaimer**: Optional sensors are calculated values derived from SMHI weather data. They are not official SMHI forecasts.

data_description.enable_comfort_sensors: Feels-like temperature combining wind chill and heat index
data_description.enable_frost_sensors: Frost risk percentage (0-100%) and binary frost detection sensor
data_description.enable_slippery_sensors: Road ice/snow risk percentage (0-100%) and binary slippery conditions sensor
data_description.enable_impact_sensor: Overall weather severity score (0-100%) based on temperature, wind, precipitation, visibility
data_description.enable_practical_sensors: Clothing insulation (CLO), sleep comfort (%), and exercise safety (%) recommendations
data_description.enable_thermal_sensors: Heat index, humidex, dew point analysis, and heat stress assessment

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure SMHI
reconfigure.description: Update coordinates or switch back to the Home Assistant Home location.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to SMHI. Try again later.
error.out_of_bounds: The coordinates are outside the valid SMHI forecast area.
error.unknown: Unexpected error while validating setup. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: SMHI is already configured for these coordinates.

init.title: SMHI options
init.description: Changes are applied by reloading the integration automatically.

data.enable_thermal_sensors: Enable thermal comfort sensors (3 comprehensive indices)
